overview: Frost Wyvern is a Boss-class Dragon/Beast monster found in Ice Abyss. 2 grades: Common, Elite. Base stats (Common): 3500 HP, 38 physical damage, 500 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 999, MaxImpactEndurance 999. 49 attacks, 0 combo chains. Highest damage: Combo Leap Attack3 at 220% ratio (836 base damage). combat radius 300, behavior tree: BT_FrostWyvern. Elite gains 2 exclusive abilityies: Special Breath Ground Elite, Special Breath Air Elite.

phases.name: Melee Combat
phases.description: 47 melee attacks. Combo Tail Attack1 (150%), Combo Tail Attack2 (180%), Combo Tail Attack2 From Forward Attack L (180%), and more.

phases.name: Ranged Attacks
phases.description: 16 ranged attacks. Combo Breath Ground (160%), Combo Breath Ground From Tail Attack2 (160%), Combo Breath Ground From Two Hand Attack (160%), and more.

phases.name: Rush / Charge
phases.description: 26 rush/charge attacks for gap-closing. Combo Tail Attack2 From Leap Attack1 (180%), Combo Tail Attack2 From Leap Attack3 (180%), Combo Forward Attack L From Leap Attack3 (160%).

phases.name: Special Abilities
phases.description: 4 special abilities. Special Breath Air To Side (160%), Special Leap Attack1To Center (140%), Special Leap Attack3To Center (220%).

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

status_effects_detail.name: Extreme Cold
status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Extreme Cold icon on your status bar.

status_effects_detail.counter: Watch for the Frost Warden Curse Beam icon on your status bar.

strategies.title: High Impact Values (ImpactRes 999, Endurance 999)
strategies.description: ImpactResistance 999 and MaxImpactEndurance 999. This monster does not have a Staggered ability in its ability set.

strategies.title: Resists: Ice
strategies.description: Elemental resistances: Ice (+500). Positive reduction values reduce incoming damage of that type.

strategies.title: Projectile Reduction: 500
strategies.description: Has 500 ProjectileReductionMod, reducing physical projectile damage.

strategies.title: Very Fast — 500 Move Speed
strategies.description: Base move speed of 500 makes this one of the fastest monsters. Outrunning it is difficult.

strategies.title: Highest Damage: Combo Leap Attack3 (220% ratio)
strategies.description: Combo Leap Attack3 deals 836 damage at base (220% ratio). This is the most dangerous attack to avoid.

strategies.title: Elite Gains: Special Breath Ground Elite, Special Breath Air Elite
strategies.description: Elite grade has 2 exclusive abilities not present in lower grades: Special Breath Ground Elite, Special Breath Air Elite. These change the fight dynamics in Elite.

strategies.title: Combat Range: combat area radius 300, ability check distance 2000
strategies.description: Combat area radius 300. Ability check distance 2000.

elite_differences: Elite gains 2 exclusive abilities: Special Breath Ground Elite, Special Breath Air Elite

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.stuck_description: Has stuck-detection failsafes in behavior tree.
